testcase.name: getBirthDateTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Verifying that "Not available" matches the expected pattern ""?Not\s+available[.!"]*" ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "Not available" ~> "Not available" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute after setting a new value directly (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Assigning value "09.06.1973" to private String birthDate Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "09.06.1973" ~> "09.06.1973" (true) ✓

testcase.name: checkPersonIDNumberTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "170788-292R" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "210722+032W" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "060719A203Y" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "220893+718Th" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "181224A577" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "090623-090" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "190709%387P" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓

testcase.name: setPersonIDTests
testcase.error: dev.m3s.maeaettae.jreq.TargetException: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "personID" is null @ dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonID.checkPersonIDNumber(PersonID.java:34) at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonIDTests.setPersonIDTests(PersonIDTests.java:68) Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "personID" is null at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonIDTests.setPersonIDTests(PersonIDTests.java:68)
testcase.system-out:
Calling new PersonID( ) Calling setPersonId( "270728-2777" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "27.07.1928" ✓ Calling setPersonId( "030347+740B" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "03.03.1847" ✓ Calling setPersonId( "161201A446M" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "16.12.2001" ✓
Verifying that calling setPersonId with null argument returns "Invalid birthday!", and that the birthDate is not changed: Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "16.12.2001" Calling setPersonId( null )
